description_long: This is an adult male figure with a receding hairline and glasses, dressed in a short-sleeved, horizontally striped shirt over a long-sleeved undershirt. He wears loose-fitting jeans and simple, rounded shoes. The figure's arms are extended outward in a T-pose, and his facial features are clearly defined, including a prominent nose and visible ears. The shirt fits loosely and the jeans have subtle creases, suggesting a casual, everyday style. The hands and forearms are covered, possibly by gloves or the undershirt. The overall build is average, with a slightly hunched posture and realistic body proportions.
description: A casually dressed adult male with glasses, striped shirt, jeans, and a receding hairline, standing in a T-pose. The figure has a realistic build and detailed facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, glasses, striped shirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the receding hairline, ear, and the profile of the shirt and jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and jeans, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, ear, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt over a long-sleeved undershirt and loose-fitting jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: balding with short hair on the sides
